name: vedaai-assessment-creator
description: AI assessment creator assignment with Next.js, Express, MongoDB, Redis, BullMQ and WebSockets.

scripts.build: npm --workspace apps/web run build && npm --workspace apps/api run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace apps/web run lint && npm --workspace apps/api run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace apps/web run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/api run typecheck
